use_cases: Drag-and-drop file uploads with visual feedback and progress tracking for web applications
Multiple file uploads with thumbnail previews and upload status indicators
Media-rich platforms requiring image or video file submissions
Form attachments with progress simulation and completion feedback
Mobile-optimized file uploads with haptic feedback on completion
ai_summary: A polished drag-and-drop file upload component with simulated upload progress, file previews, and multi-file management. Features a clean minimalist interface with visual feedback for drag states, progress bars, and success indicators. Includes mobile haptic feedback on upload completion and supports both drag-and-drop and click-to-select file input methods.
